CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows the Discount Relative to Market Value plus the Assumable Buyer Subsidy. This is the total amount of public subsidy that impacts the buyer's price and can be passed on to future buyers.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows the Discount Relative to Market Value plus the Assumable Buyer Subsidy. This is the total amount of public subsidy that impacts the buyer's price and can be passed on to future buyers.
CustomField.label: Long-Term Community Investment
